name: Meliodas
lore: Captain of the Seven Deadly Sins. A demon wielding dark purgatory energy. Collab unit.

skills.description: Does Weakpoint ATK-scaled damage to one enemy. Weakpoint deals 3x damage against debuffed enemies.
Takes a counter stance. While it lasts, every attack received is countered with ATK-scaled damage to the attacker. Meliodas still takes the incoming damage, and a lethal hit is not countered.

ultimate.description: Cancels the target's stances and buffs, then does 700% ATK damage to one enemy and stuns for 2 turns.

passive.name: Deathblow
passive.description: Damage and crit chance rise by 2% for every 3% of max HP lost. A crit applies Critical: ignores 50% defense and type matchups, +50% damage. Inactive from the sub position. Teammates tagged [Demon] gain +5% all stats in battle.
